title: Concept Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <concepts_dir>/<id>/<id>.md file. Content only — progress state lives in .state/_progress.json.
x-file-example:
---
id: transformer_architecture
collection: concept
name: "Transformer Architecture"
related_concepts:
  - "[[attention_mechanism]]"
  - "[[positional_encoding]]"
tags:
  - architecture
  - deep-learning
sources:
  - "[[karpathy_makemore_2023]]"
---

id.description: Snake_case ID matching the folder name under concepts_dir and the entry in index.md

collection.description: Node type — used by Obsidian-style apps to filter nodes by collection

related_concepts.description: [[wikilink]] references to closely related concept IDs — prerequisites, follow-ons, or siblings

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes that have informed this concept

difficulty.description: Difficulty level of this concept relative to the curriculum

workflows.description: [[wikilink]] references to workflow nodes that list this concept as a prerequisite. Optional — populated when a workflow is created that gates on this concept.
